name: lumastage
description: Open-source VTuber studio with native iPhone TrueDepth tracking

scripts.build: npm run build -w @lumastage/protocol && npm run build -w @lumastage/model-compat && npm run build -w @lumastage/tracking-core && npm run build -w @lumastage/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @lumastage/protocol && npm run test -w @lumastage/model-compat && npm run test -w @lumastage/tracking-core
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @lumastage/protocol && npm run build -w @lumastage/model-compat && npm run build -w @lumastage/tracking-core && npm run typecheck -w @lumastage/desktop
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run package:mac -w @lumastage/desktop
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run package:win -w @lumastage/desktop
